notes.basis: TON whitepaper and validator docs describe a target inflation of ~0.6% annually of total supply paid to validators as staking rewards. With ~5.1B TON total supply (CoinGecko, July 2025) and ~30M TON minted annually per disclosed schedule, this implies roughly 0.5–0.6% annualized inflation.
notes.caveat: The actual rate depends on the number of active validators and elected masterchain config parameters, which can be changed by governance. Real-time on-chain config is readable at tonscan.org/config but requires manual parsing of ConfigParam 14 (block rewards) and is not pre-computed as an annualized rate on any free aggregator.
notes.why_not_available: CoinGecko does not publish a circulating supply time-series API on the free tier sufficient to compute YoY change precisely; Messari free profile does not include TON inflation metrics; DefiLlama does not track TON emissions; no public free-tier emissions dashboard exists for TON as of 2025-07-14.
